name: Easy Graham Peanut Butter Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the Graham flour and salt.
2. Add baking soda and sugar to the flour mixture.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk together the egg, milk, and peanut butter.
4. Pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients.
5. Mix well until all ingredients are combined.
6. Grease a loaf pan with butter or cooking spray.
7. Pour the batter into the prepared loaf pan.
8. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 40 to 45 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
9. Allow the bread to cool in the pan for about 10 minutes before removing it and slicing.
